emailDraft.subjectTemplate: Free Clean Truck Check Coming to [City] Tomorrow — [Business Name]
emailDraft.bodyTemplate:
Hi [First Name / Team],

Bryan here with NorCal CARB Mobile — we run mobile CARB compliance checks for commercial fleets across the Bay Area.

We're going to be in [City] tomorrow, and I wanted to reach out directly. If your fleet has diesel vehicles over 14,000 lbs GVWR, we can knock out your CARB compliance inspection on the same trip:

✅ Mobile OBD scan
✅ OVI smoke opacity test
✅ No appointment needed
✅ Available 24/7, 363 days a year
✅ We come to YOU

Don't wait for the State to show up — get ahead of it and call me direct.

Bryan
NorCal CARB Mobile
📞 [Your Phone Number]
🌐 norcalcarbmobile.com

P.S. Reply to this email or text me — I respond fast.

voicemailHook: Hey [Name], Bryan with NorCal CARB Mobile. I'll be in [City] tomorrow doing Clean Truck Checks for fleets right by you. If you've got diesels over 14,000 lbs I can knock yours out same trip — mobile OBD and OVI smoke opacity, 24/7, 363 days a year. Call me before the State calls you. [Your number].
nextSteps: 1. Verify all 22 leads against Master CRM tab 'Leads_2026-05-14' (Sheet ID: 1TdNnf7eLaPNN3anaBGpNdjo_unK04zWwZJ859ZDvIO4) to remove existing customers.
2. Fill in contact emails for each lead in the emailDraft.perLead array above.
3. Replace all [Your Number] placeholders with Bryan's actual cell/business number.
4. SMS: Use your phone or a bulk SMS tool — send at 10:30 AM tomorrow (2026-05-23) starting with the 7 HOT leads.
5. Email: Load each personalized email into Squarespace Email Campaigns or Gmail drafts.
6. Update call status in the Cold Calls panel on the Command Center (gumption.manus.space) as you work through the list.
7. HOT call order: ArborTech → Saunders Tree → Castillo Tree → Graham Tree → Boyett Concrete → LS Trucking → Daylight Transport
